_meta.source: Brian, from live site YTD as of release day
_meta.mechanics: Displayed YTD = frozen baseline + weighted return of NEW primary tickers since anchor closes. Anchor = official closes of 2026-07-06 (Mon). Live tracking = primary ticker (Row 1) only; Ticker Option (Row 2) is display-only.
_meta.example: High Conviction baseline 48.45%; if new holdings gain 1% over 30 days, site shows 49.45% YTD.

benchmarks.note: SPY / QQQ rows keep true Jan-2 YTD math (no baseline offset) — External check: confirm with Brian whether benchmarks should also show plain YTD or be re-anchored.
